commands.command:
mkdir -p .husky && printf '#!/usr/bin/env sh
export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096"
npx lint-staged
npm test
' > .husky/pre-commit && chmod 755 .husky/pre-commit

commands: cat .husky/pre-commit # check pre-commit hook before migration
vp migrate --no-interactive # migration should replace lint-staged in-place
cat .husky/pre-commit # check vp lint-staged replaced npx lint-staged in-place
